children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 1 Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: 2 Administration
children.text: The term “Administration” means the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.

children.label: i
children.text: hydrographic, bathymetric, photogrammetric, lidar, radar, remote sensing, or shoreline and other ocean- and coastal-related surveying;

children.label: iii
children.text: tide, water level, and current observations; or

children.label: B
children.text: is used in providing hydrographic services.

children.label: A
children.text: the management, maintenance, interpretation, certification, and dissemination of bathymetric, hydrographic, shoreline, geodetic, geospatial, geomagnetic, and tide, water level, and current information, including the production of nautical charts, nautical information databases, hydrodynamic forecast and datum transformation models, and other products derived from hydrographic data;

children.label: B
children.text: the development of nautical information systems; and

children.heading: Coast and Geodetic Survey Act
children.label: 5 Coast and Geodetic Survey Act
children.text: The term “Coast and Geodetic Survey Act” means the Act entitled “An Act to define the functions and duties of the Coast and Geodetic Survey, and for other purposes”, approved ( et seq.).August 6, 194733 U.S.C. 883a
